name: Muay Thai – Attack (5 Methods of JKD)

drills.title: SDA – Single Direct Attack
drills.description: Start with a Jeet Kune Do lead straight to intercept. Immediately follow up with a Muay Thai roundhouse. Enter, strike, exit clean.
drills.category: Muay Thai – Attack (5 Methods of JKD)

drills.title: ABC – Attack By Combination
drills.description: Jab to flick jab, then cross. As they react, hammer the lead leg with a low kick. Jab, cross, low kick.
drills.category: Muay Thai – Attack (5 Methods of JKD)

drills.title: HIA – Hand Immobilization Attack
drills.description: Simulate trapping their lead hand (touch or pin the bag), then fire a horizontal elbow. Clinch and deliver two strong knees.
drills.category: Muay Thai – Attack (5 Methods of JKD)

drills.title: PIA – Progressive Indirect Attack
drills.description: Feint a low kick to shift their weight. Switch kick to the body as they adjust. Reset and pivot out.
drills.category: Muay Thai – Attack (5 Methods of JKD)

drills.title: ABD – Attack By Drawing
drills.description: Step back and lower your guard slightly to draw them in. Fire a teep to the midline, then cross and follow with a diagonal elbow.
drills.category: Muay Thai – Attack (5 Methods of JKD)

drills.title: Lead Shin Check
drills.description: Check an imaginary kick with your lead shin, then return immediately with a cross and a low kick.

drills.title: Jab Parry & Counter
drills.description: Parry the incoming jab, counter with a lead hook, then teep the bag to regain space.

drills.title: Slip & Uppercut
drills.description: Slip outside the centerline and throw a fast rear uppercut. Angle out and stay light.

drills.title: Catch & Scoop
drills.description: Catch and scoop the imagined kick. Slam a rear low kick to finish the exchange.

drills.title: Cover & Elbow
drills.description: Cover and shell against pressure. Explode with a lead elbow and step off at an angle.

drills.title: Circle & Low Kick
drills.description: Circle left while peppering the bag with jabs. On the third jab, drop a low kick, then continue circling.

drills.title: In & Out Teep
drills.description: Step in with jab, jab. Retreat with a teep. Control the centerline and range.

drills.title: Pendulum Step
drills.description: Pendulum step in with jab-cross. Pendulum out with a switch teep to reset distance.

drills.title: Diagonal Step
drills.description: Step diagonally offline, land a cross to the bag's side. Follow with a switch kick, then reset.

drills.title: Angle & Hook
drills.description: Angle right with a jab, step left into a hook. Stay light and mobile—bag centered, feet active.

drills.title: Double Jab Cross
drills.description: Double jab to measure distance. Fire a sharp cross down the center. Keep your head moving between shots.

drills.title: Slip & Body Hook
drills.description: Slip outside the bag's line and dig a hook to the body. Rise with a cross. Reset with light footwork.

drills.title: Duck & Uppercut
drills.description: Duck under as if avoiding a hook. Come up with a rear shovel uppercut. Follow with a lead hook to the head.

drills.title: Level Change Combo
drills.description: Jab to the head, jab to the body, cross upstairs. Mix your levels to confuse and break the guard.

drills.title: Roll & Hook-Cross-Hook
drills.description: Roll under a punch, step in, and throw a compact 3-punch combo: hook–cross–hook. Maintain tight form and balance.

drills.title: SDA – Single Direct Attack
drills.description: Step into range and land a sharp, committed cross down the pipe. One strike, full intent. Reset immediately.

drills.title: ABC – Attack By Combination
drills.description: Jab to the head, jab to the body, rise with a rear uppercut, then finish with a lead hook. Flow seamlessly through each shot.

drills.title: HIA – Hand Immobilization Attack
drills.description: Simulate pinning or framing the guard with your lead hand, then fire a short-range rear straight. Follow with a clinch-entry elbow or frame off.

drills.title: PIA – Progressive Indirect Attack
drills.description: Feint a jab to the head, then throw a lead hook to the body. Rise with a rear hook to the head. Use rhythm breaks to open the guard.

drills.title: ABD – Attack by Drawing
drills.description: Drop your level and posture slightly to bait a counter. As the bag swings in, step off line and counter with a jab–cross–pivot out. Make them chase shadows.

drills.title: Front Kick Snap
drills.description: Chamber high and snap a lightning-fast front kick to the bag’s core. Keep posture upright and recover clean.

drills.title: Spinning Hook Kick
drills.description: Spin into a tight hook kick, striking with the heel at eye level. Reset with a pivot or bounce back.

drills.title: Axe Kick
drills.description: Fire an axe kick straight down onto the bag. Imagine striking collarbone-level. Step off line after impact.

drills.title: Side Kick Rib Strike
drills.description: Lead with a side kick to the ribs. Full chamber, then extend with control and recoil. Stay bladed.

drills.title: Jumping Roundhouse
drills.description: Feint low, then leap into a jumping roundhouse kick. Land soft and square up immediately. Flashy but controlled.
